name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 client policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 10-20 client policies/month, missed policy updates cause inaccurate client records. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of policy changes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate client records due to missed policy updates
